Jobs.Name: StoreMonitors
Jobs.Description: Store measuring point and sensor metadata twice per hour.

Jobs.Name: CheckForOfflineMonitors
Jobs.Description: Check offline monitor state three times per hour.

Jobs.Name: StorePeakRecordsLastDataTime
Jobs.Description: Store peak records every five minutes.

Jobs.Name: StoreVeffRecords
Jobs.Description: Store effective vibration records every two hours.

Jobs.Name: StoreVdvRecords
Jobs.Description: Store vibration dose records every two hours, fifteen minutes after Veff.

Jobs.Name: NotifyBatteryLevels
Jobs.Description: Notify battery levels every fifteen minutes.

Jobs.Name: Monitoring
Jobs.Description: Run business-hours monitoring every thirty minutes Monday through Friday.

Jobs.Name: DispatchAlerts
Jobs.Description: Dispatch durable alert deliveries every minute.

Jobs.Name: CleanupAlerts
Jobs.Description: Clean completed durable alert deliveries daily.
